parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ingest_batches (
    source,
    source_endpoint,
    source_file_path,
    source_hash,
    workflow_version,
    payload_shape,
    notes
) VALUES (
    'uex',
    'https://api.uexcorp.space/2.0/items_prices_all/',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'phase3-v1',
    NULL,
    'Phase 3 raw ingest for items_prices_all'
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO uex_prices_raw (
    ingest_batch_id,
    asset_type,
    asset_source_id,
    payload
)
VALUES (
    $1::uuid,
    $2::TEXT,
    $3::TEXT,
    $4::jsonb
);
